Sample docs fixture for the golden integration test.

# Overview

This repository demonstrates docs ingestion. The overview section links
to the [setup guide](docs/guide.md) for details.

# Installation

```bash
# this fenced heading must not split sections
pip install memory-cl
```

Install steps live here.

# Usage

Run the server and read the [notes](notes.txt#scratch) for caveats.
External links like [the site](https://example.com/page.md) are ignored.
